steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Ephydra cinerea and Nodularia. The answer must create a direct contrast or distinction between these two organisms.

steps.title: Find what contrasts the organisms
steps.content:
The correct response directly contrasts the two organisms using “whereas,” identifying that Ephydra cinerea are aquatic insects while Nodularia are bacteria.

The other three either address irrelevant details (B's salt concentration), describe only one organism, or emphasize a shared location instead of a difference (C's “both”).

That confirms A is correct.
